fn process_names(names: &[&str]) {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for name in names {
        let owned = name.to_string();
        results.push(owned);
    }
    println!("{:?}", results);
}

fn match_names(names: &[String], pattern: &str) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut matched = Vec::new();
    for name in names {
        let name_str = name.to_string();
        if name_str.contains(pattern) {
            matched.push(name_str);
        }
    }
    matched
}

fn collect_tags(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut tags = Vec::new();
    for item in items {
        let tag = item.tag.to_string();
        tags.push(tag);
    }
    tags
}

fn format_entries(entries: &[Entry]) -> String {
    let mut output = String::new();
    for entry in entries {
        let s = entry.name.to_string();
        output.push_str(&s);
        output.push('\n');
    }
    output
}

struct Item { tag: String }
struct Entry { name: String }
